basic_details.short_information: WCD Odisha has been announced for 02 posts such as Anganwadi Helper for eligible12th candidates with required trade certificate or experience, with the application window online open from 21-05-2026 to 04-06-2026 on awc.odisha.gov.in.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.
